name: Strong signal — new mumz breastfeeding product
description: Many relevant reviews for this stage. Should return high confidence verdict.

name: Stage mismatch — toddler product asked as pregnant
description: Graco High Chair has mainly toddler reviews. Pregnant stage should yield low confidence or insufficient data.

name: Empty reviews list
description: No reviews provided at all. System must refuse gracefully, not hallucinate.

name: Single review only
description: Only one review available. Confidence must be low and insufficient_data must be true.

reviews: Really gentle on my newborn's skin. No irritation at all.

name: Arabic-only reviews, English output requested
description: Reviews in Arabic, output requested in English only. System must handle cross-lingual synthesis.

reviews: حاولت عدة أنواع من الزجاجات وطفلي رفضها كلها. هذه الزجاجة قبلها من أول مرة.
أفضل زجاجة للرضاعة المختلطة. لا ارتباك للرضيع بين الثدي والزجاجة.
الحلمة ناعمة جداً وتشبه الثدي الطبيعي. أنصح بها بشدة.

name: Contradictory reviews — mixed signal
description: Some reviews say great, some say baby rejected it. Uncertainty flags must be present.

reviews: My baby took to this bottle immediately. Best decision we made.
My baby flatly refused this bottle. Tried for 3 weeks and gave up.
Works great for us. No nipple confusion at all.
Did not work for our baby. Switched brands after a week.
Some babies love it some hate it. Lucky ours accepted it first try.

name: Toddler stage — product with good toddler signal
description: Hatch Sound Machine has toddler ok-to-wake feature reviews. Should return confident toddler verdict.

name: Spam / low-quality reviews only
description: Reviews are very short and uninformative. Should flag uncertainty and low confidence.

reviews: Great!!!
Love it
5 stars
Amazing product
Good

name: Arabic output only — Arabic native quality check
description: Arabic verdict must read as natural native Arabic, not a translation. Manual review required.

expected.manual_check: Arabic text must use natural colloquial/formal Arabic, not word-for-word translation patterns.

name: Off-topic reviews — wrong product context
description: Reviews are about a completely unrelated product. Grounded must be false or uncertainty very high.

reviews: The car seat was easy to install and very sturdy.
Excellent stroller, folds in one hand.
The travel cot fits perfectly in the boot of our SUV.
High chair is great for weaning.

name: Pregnant stage — product with strong pregnant signal
description: Multiple reviews explicitly from pregnant moms. Should return a relevant verdict for that stage.

name: Safety concern in reviews — must surface in cons
description: Reviews mention a safety or health concern. This must appear in cons, not be omitted.

reviews: The glass broke when my toddler dropped it. Safety hazard with walking babies.
My 2 year old smashed it on the floor. Scary moment.
Glass is fine for newborns but dangerous once they can throw things.
Would recommend plastic version for toddlers specifically.
